title: Make the PERFECT Videos with Claude Code (Full Workflow)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates an AI video generation workflow using Claude Code and Archon that automates the entire production pipeline from concept to finished video. The system uses HyperFrames for video generation, integrates AI voice and visuals, and runs as a single command requiring no traditional production team or editors.
